steps.title: Describe the specific artwork
steps.content: The student wants to describe Silver Upper White River to a new audience. The useful notes are its date, form, material, and scale: completed in 2015, it is an installation made of recycled silver that fills an entire gallery wall.

steps.title: Reject biography and comparisons
steps.content: Choice B focuses on Chen's reputation. Choice C gives more detail about Women's Table than about Silver Upper White River. Choice D compares the work to Women's Table instead of clearly describing it for someone unfamiliar with it. The full description of the artwork fits the goal. The answer is A.
